human_label: Child is age 2 months up to 5 years (eligible for iCCM assessment)
source_quote: assess, classify, and treat sick children age 2 months up to 5 years in the community

human_label: Child has cough
source_quote: Does the child have a cough?

human_label: Cough for 14 days or more (danger sign)
source_quote: A cough for 14 days or more is a danger sign.

human_label: Child has fever (reported or in last 3 days)
source_quote: Does the child have fever now or in the last 3 days?

human_label: Fever for 7 days or more (danger sign)
source_quote: Fever for 7 days or more is a danger sign.

human_label: Fever less than 7 days (eligible for RDT in malaria area)
source_quote: Fever (less than 7 days) in a malaria area

human_label: Child has diarrhoea (3+ loose/watery stools in 24 hours)
source_quote: Diarrhoea is 3 or more loose or watery stools in 24 hours.

human_label: Diarrhoea for 14 days or more (danger sign)
source_quote: Diarrhoea for 14 days or more is a danger sign.

human_label: Blood in stool / dysentery (danger sign)
source_quote: Blood in stool (dysentery) is a danger sign.

human_label: Convulsion during current illness (danger sign)
source_quote: A convulsion during the current illness is a danger sign.

human_label: Child not able to drink or feed anything (danger sign)
source_quote: A child who cannot drink or feed anything at all has a danger sign.

human_label: Child vomits everything (danger sign)
source_quote: A child who vomits everything and cannot hold anything down has a danger sign.

human_label: Child is unusually sleepy or unconscious (danger sign)
source_quote: A child who is unusually sleepy, difficult to wake, or unconscious has a danger sign.

human_label: Chest indrawing present (danger sign)
source_quote: Chest indrawing is when the lower chest wall goes IN when the child breathes in. This is a danger sign.

threshold_expression: (demo_age_months >= 2 AND demo_age_months < 12 AND v_respiratory_rate >= 50) OR (demo_age_months >= 12 AND demo_age_months < 60 AND v_respiratory_rate >= 40)
human_label: Fast breathing for age (≥50 if 2–11 months; ≥40 if 12–59 months)
source_quote: 2 months up to 12 months: 50 breaths per minute or more; 12 months up to 5 years: 40 breaths per minute or more

human_label: Child is age 6 months up to 5 years (eligible for MUAC)
source_quote: Use the MUAC (Mid-Upper Arm Circumference) strap on children age 6 months up to 5 years.

human_label: MUAC green — not malnourished
source_quote: GREEN: not malnourished

human_label: MUAC yellow — moderate malnutrition
source_quote: YELLOW: moderate malnutrition (refer to supplementary feeding if available)

human_label: MUAC red — severe malnutrition (danger sign)
source_quote: RED: severe malnutrition - DANGER SIGN - refer urgently

human_label: Bilateral pitting oedema of both feet (severe malnutrition danger sign)
source_quote: Press thumbs gently on the top of each foot for 3 seconds. If dents remain on BOTH feet, the child has oedema.

human_label: Malaria RDT result is positive
source_quote: POSITIVE = red lines in both C and T windows.

human_label: Malaria RDT result is negative
source_quote: NEGATIVE = red line in C window only.

human_label: Malaria RDT result is invalid (repeat test)
source_quote: INVALID = no line in C window; repeat with new test.

threshold_expression: p_convulsions == true OR p_not_able_to_drink_or_feed == true OR p_vomiting_everything == true OR p_unusually_sleepy_or_unconscious == true
human_label: Any general danger sign present (convulsions, unable to drink/feed, vomits everything, unusually sleepy/unconscious)
source_quote: A convulsion during the current illness is a danger sign. A child who cannot drink or feed anything at all has a danger sign. A child who vomits everything has a danger sign. A child who is unusually sleepy or unconscious has a danger sign.

threshold_expression: p_any_general_danger_sign == true OR p_chest_indrawing == true OR p_cough_duration_danger == true OR p_fever_duration_danger == true OR p_diarrhoea_duration_danger == true OR p_blood_in_stool == true OR p_muac_red == true OR p_bilateral_foot_oedema == true
human_label: Any danger sign requiring urgent referral
source_quote: Give the first dose of any appropriate medicine before referral.

human_label: Severe acute malnutrition (MUAC red or bilateral oedema)
source_quote: RED: severe malnutrition - DANGER SIGN - refer urgently; If dents remain on BOTH feet, the child has oedema.

threshold_expression: p_cough_present == true AND p_fast_breathing == true AND p_chest_indrawing == false AND p_any_general_danger_sign == false AND p_cough_duration_danger == false
human_label: Pneumonia — fast breathing without danger signs, treatable at community level with amoxicillin
source_quote: If breathing is normal and child is improving, complete the full 5-day course of amoxicillin.

threshold_expression: p_fever_present == true AND p_fever_under_7_days == true AND p_rdt_positive == true AND p_any_general_danger_sign == false
human_label: Malaria — RDT positive, fever <7 days, no danger signs, treatable with AL
source_quote: Do not give antimalarial medicine unless the RDT is positive.

threshold_expression: p_diarrhoea_present == true AND p_diarrhoea_duration_danger == false AND p_blood_in_stool == false AND p_any_general_danger_sign == false
human_label: Diarrhoea without danger signs — treatable with ORS and zinc
source_quote: Diarrhoea for 14 days or more is a danger sign. Blood in stool (dysentery) is a danger sign.

human_label: Zinc dosing: half tablet (age 2 up to 6 months)
source_quote: 2 months up to 6 months 1/2 tablet Once daily 10 days / 5 tablets

human_label: Zinc dosing: full tablet (age 6 months up to 5 years)
source_quote: 6 months up to 5 years 1 tablet Once daily 10 days / 10 tablets

human_label: Amoxicillin dosing: 1 tablet twice daily (age 2 up to 12 months)
source_quote: 2 months up to 12 months 1 tablet Twice daily 5 days / 10 tablets

human_label: Amoxicillin dosing: 2 tablets twice daily (age 12 months up to 5 years)
source_quote: 12 months up to 5 years 2 tablets Twice daily 5 days / 20 tablets

human_label: AL dosing: 1 tablet twice daily (age 2 months up to 3 years)
source_quote: 2 months up to 3 years 1 tablet AL Twice daily 3 days / 6 tablets

human_label: AL dosing: 2 tablets twice daily (age 3 years up to 5 years)
source_quote: 3 years up to 5 years 2 tablets AL Twice daily 3 days / 12 tablets

human_label: At follow-up: diarrhoea still present
source_quote: If yes and for less than 14 days, continue ORS and zinc. If 14 days or more, refer.

human_label: At follow-up: fever still present
source_quote: If RDT was positive and antimalarial was given, the child should improve. If still febrile, refer.

human_label: At follow-up: cough still present
source_quote: After 3 days: Is the child still coughing? Count breaths again. If still fast breathing, refer.

human_label: At follow-up: cough persists with fast breathing — refer
source_quote: After 3 days: Is the child still coughing? Count breaths again. If still fast breathing, refer.

human_label: At follow-up: cough persists but breathing normal — complete amoxicillin course
source_quote: If breathing is normal and child is improving, complete the full 5-day course of amoxicillin.

human_label: Child feels hot by touch (fever on examination)
source_quote: Does the child have fever now or in the last 3 days?
